raw_consumer_statement:
Case ID : XXXX I am filing a complaint against Citibank for improperly denying my credit card dispute for a {$76.00} return ( part of a {$190.00} transaction ) and failing to provide the required documentation explaining their decision. 

On XX/XX/year>, Citi closed my dispute and reversed my conditional credit. Their online portal explicitly states : " A letter detailing your dispute resolution is available in your Notices & Letters. '' However, as my attached evidence demonstrates, no such letter was ever provided to my account. Citibank is withholding the specific reason for their denial, preventing me from addressing their exact claims.

Regardless of their unstated reason, the denial is factually incorrect. My evidence proves the merchant safely received the returned merchandise ( Order # XXXX ) : - I returned the merchandise using the merchant 's provided XXXX  return label. 
- The XXXX tracking number is XXXX. 
- XXXX successfully delivered the package on XX/XX/year>, at XXXX XXXX 
- The package was delivered to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, which is the official XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 

Because the merchant safely received the returned merchandise, I am legally entitled to my refund. Citi failed to conduct a reasonable investigation and failed to provide a denial notice.
